response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in full-stack web development and software craftsmanship, he falls significantly short of the core requirements for this role. He lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience on Windows, possessing only about 6 months of professional C/C++ experience from 2014-2015. Furthermore, he does not have the required domain expertise in Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience, including strong CI/CD and TDD practices.
Proficiency in scripting languages (TypeScript, JavaScript) and Java, matching some of the desirable skills.
Some general financial sector exposure gained during his tenure at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Severely lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience.
No demonstrated experience with C++ on Windows platforms or heavy SQL Server/Oracle database management.
Missing required domain knowledge in Fixed Income, Derivatives, or Capital Markets.
